rationale: Tests whether economic risk-on momentum from the copper/gold ratio provides long-lead filtering for leveraged tech exposure.
expected_failure_mode: Commodity dynamics can decouple from technology equity trends due to localized supply-chain shocks.
stop_conditions: drift is not reproducible from point-in-time snapshots
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Rolling 12-month correlation between copper/gold momentum and NDX returns falls below 0.3.
Total turnover exceeds 24 trades per year.
